name: xllm
description: A high-performance inference engine for LLM, VLM, DiT and REC models, optimized for diverse AI accelerators. It is hosted in OpenAtom Foundation.
summaryZh: A high-performance inference engine for LLM, VLM, DiT and REC models, optimized for diverse AI accelerators. It is hosted in OpenAtom Foundation. 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
